description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, handbags from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional handbags and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsBlack handbag with a zipped main compartment, an inner zipped pocket, pleated design on the front and back, one metallic chain handle, one leather removable handle, stitch detailing and brand badge appliqued on the frontMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions: 15 cm x 21 cm
